series_metadata.series_description: Pursuant to R.C. 113.05, the Treasurer of State is required to hold in its custody a copy of the evidence of title for depository-ineligible assets owned by the funds for which the Treasurer acts as statutory custodian.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: evidence of title onsite duration which fund owns asset; upon disposition of asset, copy of evidence of title onsite remainder of current fiscal year and 2 additional fiscal years
